# Data Intake Template

Use this for every post.

```text
Asset code:
Hypothesis ID:
Scientific-style name:
Method code:
Platform:
Surface:
Date/time posted:
Topic:
Target viewer:
Primary signal:
Primary metric:
Guardrail metric:
First-frame type:
Hook type:
Text system:
Proof asset:
CTA:
Length:
Controlled exposure used? yes/no
Exposure source:
```

## 24h metrics

```text
views:
shown/impressions:
chose-to-view / stayed-to-watch:
early hold:
avg % viewed:
avg view duration:
completion:
rewatch:
saves:
sends/shares:
comments:
follows/subs:
profile clicks:
search traffic:
negative feedback/sentiment:
```

## 72h / 7d / 30d

Repeat key metrics and note curve shape:

```text
spike and decay
slow search growth
flatline
second-wave distribution
partner/community pickup
```

## Diagnosis

```text
failed gate:
strongest signal:
weakest signal:
decision: scale / replicate / rewrite / kill / pivot
next variant:
```
